title: rubus × polysperus
intro: Rubus × polysperus, also known as the raspberry-leaved raspberry or raspberry-leaved bramble, is a hybrid plant that combines the characteristics of Rubus idaeus (wild raspberry) and Rubus fruticosus (blackberry). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of anthocyanins, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus × polysperus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Rubus × polysperus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in the production of jams, preserves, and other food products.
